title: Shareholder Employee Chugie Folk Celebrates 25 Years with BSNC
summary: BSNC is pleased to recognize shareholder employee Chugie Folk on her 25 years of dedicated service to the company. In 1999 and fresh out of college, Folk was very excited to return home to Nome and be offered a job working for her Native corporation. The opportunity to contribute to BSNC’s mission,...

title: Petersburg High School drama students set sail to Neverland with “Peter and the Starcatcher”
summary: Petersburg High School drama students at a rehearsal for the spring production of “Peter and the Starcatcher.” (Photo by Shelby Herbert/KFSK) Petersburg High School debuts its spring play on Thursday, February 29th, at 6:30 p.m. “Peter and the Starcatcher” is a prequel to the J.M. Barrie classic, “Peter Pan.” It’s also one of the longest plays to reach Petersburg’s stage in several years — it’s about two hours of swashbuckling fun. KFSK’s Shelby Herbert has more on the blood, sweat, and pixie dust Petersburg students have poured into the production. It’s two days before the fi...

title: Kawerak Voices Support for HB234 – MMIP
